params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 V6-E persistent block state engine code change verification (run_id 20260506-232017-99223 8/8 OK). Adds domain-keyed shared map (mutex-protected, 5min TTL) so page_inject_h2 trigger fires on hard-reload's new H2 connection (per-tuple last_pii_block_at_ms is reset on new connection — V6-D failure mode per decision 20260506_220900). HP-V6E test: hard reload notion.so/chat AFTER PII block, engine should query domain_block map and inject warning HTML page replacing notion's SSR HTML.

test_steps: 1. Open https://www.notion.so/chat (login required if logged out)
2. Submit PII prompt → engine fires V6-A NDJSON block (S2 protection)
3. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) → new H2 connection spawned
4. SPA fetches notion.so/chat? (text/html, page_load) → V6-E query_domain_block fallback
5. Engine emits warning HTML page replacing SSR HTML
6. Verify DOM: warning bubble + Korean text + emoji

verdict_criteria.OK: warning HTML page rendered after hard reload + Korean warning text + 보안 경고 visible (V6-E confirms cross-connection scope works → notion DONE → mission ratio 14→15/31=0.484)
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_block_ok_but_reload_doesnt_injec: S2 block fires but page_inject_h2 still doesn't trigger — V6-E query path not hit OR domain mismatch (notion.so vs www.notion.so). Investigate via [APF:domain_block_query_h2] log presence.
verdict_criteria.FAIL: regression — V6-E broke existing behavior, revert

check_details.expected_engine_log_v6e: [APF:domain_block_query_h2] service=notion domain=www.notion.so age_ms=N (cross-connection scope) — present means V6-E query path triggered AFTER hard reload

notes: 48차 V6-E test. Engine deploy 20260506-232017-99223. Anonymous-namespace approach for cross-connection scope. Domain-keyed map with 5min TTL. If OK: notion DONE. If PARTIAL with [APF:domain_block_query_h2] absent: query path not hit (domain mismatch?). If PARTIAL with log present but no DOM: page_inject_h2 still has issue downstream of trigger condition.
